headlines.title: Democratic socialist Janeese Lewis George wins Washington, D.C., mayoral primary
headlines.description: Washington, D.C., City Councilmember Janeese Lewis George, a democratic socialist, has won the Democratic primary for mayor, NBC News projects, putting her in line to manage the capital city and its relationship with President Donald Trump

headlines.title: Supreme Court rules for marijuana user charged under same gun law as Hunter Biden
headlines.description: The Supreme Court endorsed a marijuana user's challenge to a law that bars people who consume illegal drugs from having firearms, the same law that Hunter Biden was convicted under.

headlines.title: Trump finally sealed his Iran deal. Now talks on the ‘final’ agreement begin.
headlines.description: “This wasn’t easy.”That’s the verdict of President Donald Trump, as he finally signed a deal to end the Iran war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz

headlines.title: Sen. Slotkin to introduce bill to bar presidents from sending troops or armed federal officers to polling places
headlines.description: Sen. Elissa Slotkin, D-Mich., plans to introduce a bill Thursday that would ban the president from sending armed military or federal agents to polling sites during elections

headlines.title: Some Republican lawmakers raise concerns about U.S.-Iran deal
headlines.description: NBC News Correspondents Monica Alba, Courtney Kube and Mel Zanona discuss the memorandum of understanding reached between the U.S. and Iran as both countries claim victory and Republican lawmakers express concerns. NBC News Chief Business and Data Correspondent Brian Cheung lays out the timeline for gas prices to return to pre-war levels.

headlines.title: Obama encourages people to not give in to despair in current political climate
headlines.description: Former President Barack Obama speaks at the opening of the Obama Presidential Center, imploring Americans not to give in to cynicism and despair in the current divisive political climate.

headlines.title: U.S. lifts naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz and Iranian ports
headlines.description: The U.S. has announced that the naval blockade on all maritime traffic entering and exiting Iranian ports and coastal ares, including the Strait of Hormuz, will be lifted.

headlines.title: U.S. deportation tracker: Counting arrests, detentions and border crossings
headlines.description: President Donald Trump came into office promising the largest mass deportation in U.S history, targeting the more than 10 million unauthorized migrants living in the United States.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: Pentagon investigation into Iran school strike being finalized
headlines.description: WASHINGTON — Senior U.S. military officials are in the final stages of reviewing an internal investigation into a deadly airstrike on an Iranian elementary school and preparing to share it with lawmakers, according to a person familiar with the probe.

headlines.title: California billionaire tax proposal qualifies for the November ballot
headlines.description: A proposal to raise taxes on the wealthiest Californians has qualified for the November ballot, state officials said Wednesday, setting up what could be an expensive and divisive fight

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.
